Title: [SETUP] Initialize Next.js project
Description: Clone repo, npm install, confirm dev server runs. TypeScript + Tailwind configured.
Label: Setup

Title: [SETUP] Configure API clients & env
Description: Create lib/ folder with typed clients for Speechmatics / OpenAI / Qdrant / ElevenLabs. Copy .env.example to .env.local, fill keys.
Label: Setup

Title: [SETUP] Deploy to Vercel (staging)
Description: Connect GitHub repo to Vercel. Add all env vars. Get public URL for judges. Do early — not last minute.
Label: Setup

Title: [VOICE] Browser audio recording
Description: Implement useAudioRecorder hook using MediaRecorder API. Start/stop on button hold. Output: audio blob (WebM). Test in Chrome.
Label: Voice

Title: [VOICE] Speechmatics real-time STT
Description: Integrate Speechmatics RT transcription via WebSocket. Stream audio chunks. Accumulate transcript. Handle final vs partial events. Return transcript on silence.
Label: Voice

Title: [VOICE] TTS voice output
Description: Integrate ElevenLabs TTS. Input: text string. Output: audio auto-played in browser. Test 3 voices, pick the best. Fallback: OpenAI TTS.
Label: Voice

Title: [VOICE] Waveform visualizer
Description: Animated waveform using Web Audio API AnalyserNode. Active during recording and TTS playback. Dark bg #0a0a0a, orange bars #f97316.
Label: UI

Title: [MEMORY] Qdrant setup — 3 collections
Description: Create Qdrant Cloud account. Create: oral_knowledge (senior expertise), aircraft_history (per-tail logs), sop_chunks (RAG source). Configure in lib/qdrant.ts.
Label: Memory

Title: [MEMORY] Capture endpoint POST /api/capture
Description: Input: transcript + technician + tail + component + conditions. LLM extracts structured knowledge. Embed + upsert oral_knowledge. Return id + confirmation.
Label: Memory

Title: [MEMORY] Query endpoint POST /api/query
Description: Input: transcript + tail. Embed query. Parallel: Qdrant search oral_knowledge + sop_chunks. LLM synthesis (SOP > oral > history priority). Return response + sources.
Label: Memory

Title: [MEMORY] Log endpoint POST /api/log
Description: Input: transcript + tail + technician. LLM extracts log entry. Upsert aircraft_history. Return confirmation + total intervention count for this tail.
Label: Memory

Title: [AGENT] Orchestrator agent
Description: lib/orchestrator.ts — classifies intent from transcript: capture | query | log. Routes to correct endpoint. Built on LLM tool use.
Label: Agentic

Title: [AGENT] Elicitation agent (Capture mode)
Description: lib/elicitation-agent.ts — after senior speaks, generates 1 targeted follow-up question. Re-records answer. Structures final knowledge object before upsert.
Label: Agentic

Title: [DATA] Mock SOP documents
Description: Create data/sops/cfm56-5b-72-21.txt (N1 vibration) and cfm56-5b-72-00.txt (fan inspection). 10-15 realistic-looking procedure entries each.
Label: Demo Data

Title: [DATA] Seed Marc's oral knowledge
Description: Create data/marc-knowledge.json with 6+ entries across 2 aircraft. Run scripts/seed.ts to populate Qdrant. Confirm query endpoint returns Marc's note on F-GKXA N1 vibration query.
Label: Demo Data

Title: [UI] Main demo interface
Description: Two-mode UI: Capture (senior) / Query (junior). Hold-to-speak button. TranscriptPanel. ResponsePanel with source attribution. AircraftBadge (F-GKXA). Dark industrial aesthetic.
Label: UI

Title: [DEMO] End-to-end QA + rehearsal
Description: Run exact 3-min demo script 3 times. Document failures. Fix latency (target <3s). Prepare pre-recorded audio fallback. Confirm Vercel stable.
Label: Demo
